cases.description: manifest 디렉토리 없음 → 'k8s 미적용' 메시지 + exit 0
Deployment with resources + non-latest image + securityContext.runAsNonRoot=true → 0 warn / 0 fail

files.k8s/deploy.yaml:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web
  labels:
    app: web
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: nginx:1.25
        resources:
          limits: {memory: 512Mi}
          requests: {memory: 256Mi}

cases.description: Deployment에 resources 키 없음 → resources 누락 검출

files.k8s/deploy.yaml:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: nginx:1.25

cases.description: image: nginx:latest → image tag 위험 검출

files.k8s/deploy.yaml:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: nginx:latest

cases.description: selector {app:api} vs template labels {app:api,env:prod} → mismatch 아님 (selector ⊆ template). selector {app:api,env:prod} vs template {app:api} → fail

files.k8s/deploy.yaml:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
      env: prod
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: api:1.0
